case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ZULMA AURORA FLORES GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORES GONZALEZ, ZULMA AURORA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 - SERVED MAR-03-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES GONZALEZ, ZULMA AURORA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2019 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-03-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY GUADALUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ZULMA AURORA FLORES GONZALEZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICES.
